vulnerability.reference: Watermark verifies token statistics, not semantic integrity, so content can be forged.
vulnerability.generated: Reliance on spoofable LLM watermarks renders developers unable to disprove false content attribution.

impact.reference: Reputational and legal damage to LLM providers from false attribution of harmful content.
impact.generated: LLM developers suffer reputational harm and wrongful accountability for harmful outputs they did not generate.

dose_response.reference: Spoofing attacks forge harmful content while preserving watermark statistics, causing false attribution that results in reputational and legal damage to LLM providers.
dose_response.generated: Vulnerability of LLM watermarking to spoofing attacks, through false blame of developers for harmful content, triggers their inability to disprove false attribution, leading to reputational harm and wrongful accountability.
